MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2014 ASSIGNED TO JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON NOV-17-2014 AT 1:40 PM IN DEPT. 306, JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER. AT AROUND 10:30AM, THE COURT ACCEPTED DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S 170.6 CCP PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE AS TO JUDGE ROBERTSON. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF TWO WITNESSES IS DENIED. PARTIES ARE TO REPORT BACK AT 1:30PM. AT AROUND 1:40PM, THE COURT ASSIGNED THE MATTER TO JUDGE RICHARD ULMER FOR TRIAL. TIME ESTIMATE: 10-12 DAYS. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice
Off Calendar Oct-23-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. There exist triable issues of material fact regarding (1) where the IV line was inserting into plaintiff's wrist; (2) and whether defendant breached the standard of care and caused injury to plaintiff. (See Plaintiff's deposition, pgs. 145-148 and declarations of Dr. Timothy Angelotti and Dr. Tracy Newkirk). The court overrules defendant's evidentiary objections. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg
